patch.value: Add structured JSON output format to the gantt exporter

pm gantt export --format json emits the computed CPM schedule as machine-readable JSON (window, options, summary, milestones, per-item start/end/duration/slack/progress/critical/overdue/deps) for agents and scripts.

pm gantt export --format json produces valid, deterministic JSON with per-item schedule + summary; existing formats (mermaid/html/ascii/csv) and default pm gantt unchanged; tests cover the new format; release:check green.

Added json to ExportFormat/EXPORT_FORMATS + renderJson() emitting deterministic structured schedule (window/options/summary/milestones/items[]); shared gatingDepIds() with CSV; 5 new tests; README documented.
pm gantt export --format json yields valid deterministic JSON; all other formats and default pm gantt unchanged; 59 tests pass.
Implemented JSON exporter format with tests and docs
pm gantt export --format json returns valid deterministic structured JSON; all other formats and default pm gantt behavior unchanged.
